sources.label: NHS summary list
borrowed: Compact key-value presentation for booked facts, reminder posture, and repair steps
Low-noise transactional summary structure instead of stacked cards
rejected: Turning the manage surface into a generic check-answers page with many inline edits

sources.label: NHS date input
borrowed: Explicit day-first date wording and factual date labeling
rejected: Adding segmented date-entry controls to a route that only needs display-first appointment facts

sources.label: NHS confirmation page
borrowed: Keep the appointment details immediately below the primary state message
Avoid too many competing components when the patient needs reassurance
rejected: A large celebratory confirmation panel for pending or blocked manage states

sources.label: NHS buttons
borrowed: Verb-first action labels
One dominant action per state cluster
rejected: Multiple competing primaries inside the same manage state

sources.label: NHS writing guidance
borrowed: Short factual sentences for pending, recovery, and destructive states
rejected: Over-reassuring copy before manage settlement is authoritative

sources.label: Linear redesign hierarchy
borrowed: Calm spacing and reduced chrome around the primary task detail
Strong hierarchy without dashboard noise
rejected: Productivity-app chrome that would make a patient manage route feel operational instead of trustworthy

sources.label: Linear design refresh
borrowed: Keep structure consistent while edge-case states multiply
Remove ornament that competes with the core task
rejected: Decorative secondary systems around a trust-sensitive patient task

sources.label: Carbon status indicators
borrowed: Pair state with text, not color alone
Reserve stronger status treatment for the highest-attention manage blockers

sources.label: Carbon loading pattern
borrowed: Use bounded pending regions instead of a full-page loading takeover
Keep the current appointment summary visible while one action is processing
rejected: Replacing the whole manage route with a spinner overlay for one pending action

sources.label: Carbon forms pattern
borrowed: Top-aligned concise labels for the administrative update form
rejected: Dense two-column forms for a small administrative edit

sources.label: WAI modal dialog pattern
borrowed: Trap focus inside the cancel confirmation dialog and return it on close
rejected: Using a modal for ordinary pending or recovery explanation

sources.label: WCAG focus order
borrowed: Keep focus order aligned with the summary-first reading sequence
rejected: Jumping focus away from the pinned appointment summary during same-shell state changes

sources.label: WCAG labels or instructions
borrowed: Every field and action in the administrative form and cancel dialog keeps explicit labels
rejected: Icon-only controls for destructive or repair actions

sources.label: WCAG reflow
borrowed: Collapse the manage layout to one column on smaller widths while keeping the summary pinned above child flows
rejected: Desktop-only side-by-side manage layouts that depend on horizontal scrolling

sources.label: WCAG status messages
borrowed: Use one polite status region for manage transitions and recovery updates
rejected: Assertive alerts for non-critical pending changes

sources.label: Playwright accessibility testing
borrowed: Pair route-level accessibility assertions with saved accessibility artifacts
rejected: Treating screenshots alone as accessibility proof

sources.label: Playwright aria snapshots
borrowed: Capture aria structure for ready, blocked, stale, and reschedule states
rejected: Relying only on DOM markers without accessible structure proof

sources.label: Playwright visual comparisons
borrowed: Stabilize screenshots with deterministic states and disabled animations
rejected: Capturing animated intermediate states as visual proof

sources.label: Playwright trace viewer
borrowed: Record a trace for cancel, reschedule, and same-shell manage recovery
rejected: Debugging state regressions without recorded browser traces
